app.title: C64 Basic Dungeon Crawler: Goblin Attack (C64 Basic Part 8)
app.author: ibobev
app.description: A post about creating a C64 basic dungeon crawler
proposed_tests: Verify that the program works as expected on a C64
Test the game on a modern emulator and compare results
Compare performance vs established game consoles
